braille_matching_pattern_label: Which labeled option has the same raised-dot pattern as the reference Braille cell?
Select the option whose Braille cell matches the reference pattern.
Which option shows the same raised dots as the REF Braille cell?
Find the labeled Braille option that matches the reference cell.
Which option letter matches the reference Braille-cell pattern?
braille_word_read_label: Which option shows the word written by the Braille plate?
Read the Braille word plate and select the matching word option.
Which labeled word option matches the Braille plate shown above?
Choose the option that spells the word encoded by the Braille plate.
Which option letter gives the word represented by the Braille cells?
word_braille_match_label: Which option shows the Braille for the word shown above?
Select the Braille option that matches the displayed word.
Which labeled Braille plate encodes the source word?
Choose the option whose Braille cells spell the word shown above.
Which option letter matches the source word in Braille?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_matching_pattern_labe: a clean Braille reference cell and six labeled Braille option cells
a notebook-style Braille reference cell and six labeled Braille option cells
an exam-scan-style Braille reference cell and six labeled Braille option cells
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_braille_word_read_lab: a clean Braille word plate above four labeled word options
a notebook-style Braille word plate above four labeled word options
an exam-scan-style Braille word plate above four labeled word options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_word_braille_match_la: a clean source word above four labeled Braille word-plate options
a notebook-style source word above four labeled Braille word-plate options
an exam-scan-style source word above four labeled Braille word-plate options
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_matching_pattern_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "reference_cell" and "selected_option", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_matching_pattern_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_braille_word_read_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_plate" and "selected_option", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_braille_word_read_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_word_braille_match_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_word" and "selected_option", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_word_braille_match_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
